description: Style Note Carry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil.  Product Details Black leather wallet with stitched detailing on the front  Two-fold wallet with three card slots, three insert pockets and a money holder clip on the right side  One insert pocket on the front Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 10 cm x 8 cm
